paper_title: Transformer-XL: Attentive Language Models Beyond a Fixed-Length Context

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a segment-level recurrence mechanism to enable long-term dependency modeling by reusing hidden states across segments, and proposes a novel relative positional encoding scheme to maintain temporal coherence without absolute positional biases
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: WikiText-103, enwik8, text8, One Billion Word, Penn Treebank
raw_extraction.application: Long-form text generation, language modeling, character-level and word-level language modeling
raw_extraction.research_problem: Modeling long-term dependencies in language modeling with fixed-length context constraints
raw_extraction.extension: The segment-level recurrence mechanism enables state reuse across segments, allowing the model to propagate information and capture longer-term dependencies beyond fixed context boundaries
raw_extraction.paper_title: Transformer-XL: Attentive Language Models Beyond a Fixed-Length Context
